title: GROUP_CREATE not rate-limited; subscribed client can exhaust DB with group rows
description: GROUP_CREATE checks subscription gate but not check_rate_limit. A subscribed client can call GROUP_CREATE in a tight loop, inserting two rows per call indefinitely. SET_NICKNAME is similarly unrate-limited (harmless since nicknames are immutable once set, but each call still hits the DB). GROUP_CREATE is the higher concern.
